candidate_llm_application: Phase-locked two-agent rhythmic edit correction with fixed-cadence pounder + Δt/2 moderator window + silent overrun drop

results.judge_justification: Monitoring Decoding: in-process intervention revising crucial tokens during generation — operationally a moderator inserting edits at runtime. The fixed-cadence property is not explicit but the moderator-edit-during-stream property is captured.
Real-time hallucination detection during long-form generation; scaffolds the moderator role of the candidate.
Real-time correcting analyzer for code generation explicitly runs concurrent with generator and applies high-confidence corrections — the two-role rhythmic pair.
DeCo uses preceding-layer signals to correct at decoding time — within single model not two-agent rhythmic.
Latent Collaboration MAS; structured communication but not fixed-rhythm phase-locked edit correction.
